name: 01-right-adductor-bulgarian
description: Right adductor pain triggered by Bulgarian split squat. Library has 4 mechanism-overlap movements; 2 are in the active block plan. Expectations: BSS gets a skip/reduce-load adjustment; goblet squat (incidental adductor loading) must NOT appear; ≤5 adjustments total; in-block movements ordered first.
